fork_status_and_schedule.highlight: Blob DevNet Zero: Prysm and Lighthouse trunk-ready by end of April
300K validators to run Prysm/Lighthouse with partial cells implementation
EIP-8136 (partial cells) proposed for inclusion in Glamsterdam
ETH/70 required for Glamsterdam if gas limit exceeds 80M

testing_progress.highlight: Ball DevNet 3: EIP-8037 (2D gas) causing orphaned blocks across clients
Geth/Nimbus: blocks can exceed gas limits in 2D accounting
New Amsterdam test coverage released covering all EIPs

epbs_updates.highlight: EPBS DevNet 1 launching tomorrow with Alpha 4 spec
Lighthouse: Alpha 4 spec merging tomorrow; Checkpoint Sync by end of week
Nimbus: Alpha 4 upgrade ready by Thursday/Friday with Checkpoint Sync
External builder API testing required before merging EPBS with Ball

glamsterdam_planning.highlight: Glamsterdam DevNet 0: merge Ball DevNet 3 + EPBS DevNet 1
No new EIPs for Glamsterdam DevNet 0; focus on stability
ELs need one change: forced reorg on FCU for non-tip canonical blocks

infrastructure.highlight: Proposal preference SSE event needed for external builder implementation
New beacon API for envelope creation from beacon block/payload/requests
Validator registration deprecated; moving to proposal preferences in same epoch

action_items.action: Assign one person per client team to coordinate on EIP-8037
Push EPBS DevNet 1 branches and ping Barnabas when ready
Review proposal preference SSE event PR (beacon-APIs #593)

decisions.decision: ETH/70 optional for Ball DevNet 3; not required without gas limit EIP
EPBS DevNet 1 launches tomorrow with Alpha 4 consensus spec
Glamsterdam DevNet 0 will not include new EIPs beyond Ball+EPBS merge
External builder API must be tested in isolation before Ball+EPBS merge
Next week's ACD Testing call (April 6) cancelled for Easter Monday
